metadata.description: Comprehensive SQL plan hints reference extracted from GaussDB documentation

hints.description: 指定表扫描方式为顺序扫描

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: hint指定的表，只能指定一个表，如果表存在别名应优先使用别名

hints.example: select /*+ tablescan(t1) */ * from t1
hints.notes: 支持行存表、hdfs内外表、obs表、子查询表上指定

hints.description: 指定表扫描方式为索引扫描

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: hint指定的表，只能指定一个表

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: 指定的索引名称，当前只能指定一个

hints.example: select /*+ indexscan(item i) */ * from item where i_item_sk = 100
hints.notes: 只有hint的索引属于hint的表时，才能使用该hint

hints.description: 指定表扫描方式为仅索引扫描

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: hint指定的表，只能指定一个表

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: 指定的索引名称，当前只能指定一个

hints.example: select /*+ indexonlyscan(item i) */ i_item_sk from item where i_item_sk = 100
hints.notes: 只有输出列和谓词条件列仅包含索引列才会使用

hints.description: 使用全局二级索引扫描

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

hints.example: select /*+ gsi(t1 gsi_t1_idx) */ * from t1 where c1 = 1

hints.description: 使用全局二级索引表扫描

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

hints.example: select /*+ gsitable(t1 gsi_t1_idx) */ * from t1 where c1 = 1

hints.description: 支持在目标表上使用指定的索引生成bitmapscan路径

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

hints.example: select /*+ BitmapScan(t1 it1 it3) */ * from t1 where (t1.c1 = 5 or t1.c2=6) or (t1.c3=3 or t1.c2=7)
hints.notes: 仅会根据已有的index路径组合bitmapscan路径时优先选择符合要求的路径

hints.description: 指明Join使用Nested Loop方法

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table_list
parameters.description: 表示hint表集合的字符串，多个表使用空格分隔

hints.example: select /*+ nestloop(t1 t2) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.a = t2.a

hints.description: 指明Join使用Hash Join方法

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table_list
parameters.description: 表示hint表集合的字符串，多个表使用空格分隔

hints.example: select /*+ hashjoin(t1 t2) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.a = t2.a
hints.notes: 非等值join使用hashjoin hint不会生效

hints.description: 指明Join使用Merge Join方法

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table_list
parameters.description: 表示hint表集合的字符串，多个表使用空格分隔

hints.example: select /*+ mergejoin(t1 t2) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.a = t2.a
hints.notes: 非等值join使用mergejoin hint不会生效

hints.description: 指明join的顺序，包括内外表顺序

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: join_table_list
parameters.description: 表示表join顺序的hint字符串，可以包含当前层的任意个表或别名，表之间使用空格分隔

hints.example: select /*+ leading(t1 t2 t3) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.a = t2.a join t3 on t2.b = t3.b
hints.notes: 可以用括号指定优先级，如leading((t1 t2) t3)表示t1和t2先join，再和t3 join

hints.description: 在并行的执行计划中，指定对数据进行广播

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table_list
parameters.description: 进行stream操作的单表或多表，多个表之间使用空格分隔

hints.example: select /*+ broadcast(stream_t1) */ * from stream_t1 join stream_t2 on stream_t1.a = stream_t2.a
hints.notes: 只有在生成并行的执行计划的时候，stream hint才会生效

hints.description: 在并行的执行计划中，指定对数据进行重分布

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table_list
parameters.description: 进行stream操作的单表或多表，多个表之间使用空格分隔

hints.example: select /*+ redistribute(t1 t2) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.a = t2.a
hints.notes: 只有在生成并行的执行计划的时候，stream hint才会生效

hints.description: 指定使用Hash Aggregation方法

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

hints.example: select /*+ use_hash_agg */ c1 from t1 group by c1
hints.notes: 适用于大数据量分组场景

hints.description: 指定使用Sort Aggregation方法

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

hints.example: select /*+ use_sort_agg */ c1 from t1 group by c1
hints.notes: 适用于数据已排序或小数据量分组场景

hints.description: 允许HAVING子句中的子链接提升
hints.example: select /*+EXPAND_SUBLINK_HAVING*/ a,sum(b) AS value FROM t1 GROUP BY a HAVING sum(a) >= (SELECT avg(b) FROM t1)

hints.description: 禁止HAVING子句中的子链接提升
hints.example: select /*+NO_EXPAND_SUBLINK_HAVING*/ a,sum(b) AS value FROM t1 GROUP BY a HAVING sum(a) >= (SELECT avg(b) FROM t1)

hints.description: 允许对ANY/EXISTS类型子链接进行提升
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a > ANY(SELECT /*+EXPAND_SUBLINK*/ a FROM t2)

hints.description: 禁止对ANY/EXISTS类型子链接进行提升
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a > ANY(SELECT /*+NO_EXPAND_SUBLINK*/ a FROM t2)

hints.description: 允许TargetList中的子链接进行提升
hints.example: SELECT a,(SELECT /*+EXPAND_SUBLINK_TARGET*/ avg(b) FROM t1 WHERE t1.b = t2.b) FROM t2

hints.description: 禁止TargetList中的子链接进行提升
hints.example: SELECT a,(SELECT /*+NO_EXPAND_SUBLINK_TARGET*/ avg(b) FROM t1 WHERE t1.b = t2.b) FROM t2

hints.description: 从主查询下推条件到子查询，先针对子查询的关联字段进行分组聚集，再和主查询进行关联
hints.example: SELECT t1 FROM t1 WHERE t1.c < (SELECT /*+USE_MAGIC_SET*/ sum(c) FROM t2 WHERE t1.a = t2.a)
hints.notes: 减少相关子链接的重复扫描，提升查询效率。与NO_USE_MAGIC_SET互斥

hints.description: 禁止从主查询下推条件到子查询，将带有聚集算子的子查询提前和主查询进行关联
hints.example: SELECT t1 FROM t1 WHERE t1.c < (SELECT /*+NO_USE_MAGIC_SET*/ sum(c) FROM t2 WHERE t1.a = t2.a)

hints.description: 允许对无agg的子链接进行提升，子链接提升需要保证对于每个条件只有一行输出
hints.example: SELECT t1.a FROM t1 WHERE t1.a = (SELECT /*+EXPAND_SUBLINK_UNIQUE_CHECK*/ t2.a FROM t2 WHERE t1.a = t2.b)

hints.description: 禁止对无agg的子链接进行提升
hints.example: SELECT t1.a FROM t1 WHERE t1.a = (SELECT /*+NO_EXPAND_SUBLINK_UNIQUE_CHECK*/ t2.a FROM t2 WHERE t1.a = t2.b)

hints.description: 不禁止带有复制表的fast query shipping或者Stream场景提升子链接
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (0 =(SELECT /*+NO_SUBLINK_DISABLE_REPLICATED*/ count(*) FROM t2 WHERE t2.a = t1.a))

hints.description: 禁止带有复制表的fast query shipping或者Stream场景提升子链接
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (0 =(SELECT /*+SUBLINK_DISABLE_REPLICATED*/ count(*) FROM t2 WHERE t2.a = t1.a))

hints.description: 允许子链接中表达式提升
hints.example: SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE t1.b = (SELECT /*+NO_SUBLINK_DISABLE_EXPR*/ max(b) FROM t2 WHERE t2.a = t1.a)

hints.description: 禁止子链接中表达式提升
hints.example: SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE t1.b = (SELECT /*+SUBLINK_DISABLE_EXPR*/ max(b) FROM t2 WHERE t2.a = t1.a)

hints.description: 允许子链接提升增强，支持对OR表达式等相关或非相关子链接提升
hints.example: SELECT * FROM customer WHERE substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) IN ('22', '25') AND c_acctbal > (SELECT /*+ENABLE_SUBLINK_ENHANCED*/ avg(c_acctbal) FROM customer WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00)

hints.description: 禁用子链接提升增强，禁止对OR表达式等相关或非相关子链接提升
hints.example: SELECT * FROM customer WHERE substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) IN ('22', '25') AND c_acctbal > (SELECT /*+NO_ENABLE_SUBLINK_ENHANCED*/ avg(c_acctbal) FROM customer WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00)

hints.description: Stream场景支持对listagg和arrayagg添加gather算子
hints.example: SELECT /*+PARTIAL_PUSH*/ listagg((SELECT b FROM t2 WHERE t2.b = t1.b ORDER BY t2.c limit 1), ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY t1.b) FROM t1

hints.description: Stream场景禁止对listagg和arrayagg添加gather算子
hints.example: SELECT /*+NO_PARTIAL_PUSH*/ listagg((SELECT b FROM t2 WHERE t2.b = t1.b ORDER BY t2.c limit 1), ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY t1.b) FROM t1

hints.description: 消减不必要的ORDER BY，当外层查询对内层查询结果无排序要求时，可以减少不必要的ORDER BY提升查询效率
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1,(SELECT /*+REDUCE_ORDER_BY*/ * FROM t2 ORDER BY a DESC)

hints.description: 禁止消减不必要的ORDER BY
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1,(SELECT /*+NO_REDUCE_ORDER_BY*/ * FROM t2 ORDER BY a DESC)

hints.description: 消减不必要的IS NOT NULL条件，当列属性为NOT NULL时可以消减查询条件中的IS NOT NULL判断
hints.example: SELECT /*+REMOVE_NOT_NULL*/ * FROM t1 WHERE b > 10 OR a IS NOT NULL

hints.description: 禁止消减不必要的IS NOT NULL条件
hints.example: SELECT /*+NO_REMOVE_NOT_NULL*/ * FROM t1 WHERE b > 10 OR a IS NOT NULL

hints.description: 子查询与外层查询存在同样的GROUP BY条件，两层聚集运算可能导致查询效率低下，消除子查询中的聚集运算，以此提高查询效率
hints.example: SELECT t1.b,sum(cc) FROM (SELECT /*+LAZY_AGG*/b,sum(c) AS cc FROM t2 GROUP BY b) s1,t1 WHERE s1.b = t1.b GROUP BY t1.b

hints.description: 禁用消除子查询中的聚集运算规则
hints.example: SELECT t1.b,sum(cc) FROM (SELECT /*+NO_LAZY_AGG*/b,sum(c) AS cc FROM t2 GROUP BY b) s1,t1 WHERE s1.b = t1.b GROUP BY t1.b

hints.description: 子查询提升，将子查询提升与上层做join连接，优化查询效率
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1,(SELECT /*+EXPAND_SUBQUERY*/ * FROM t2 WHERE a > 1) tt WHERE t1.a = tt.a

hints.description: 禁用子查询提升
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t1,(SELECT /*+NO_EXPAND_SUBQUERY*/ * FROM t2 WHERE a > 1) tt WHERE t1.a = tt.a

hints.description: 下推HAVING条件表达式
hints.example: SELECT /*+PUSHDOWN_HAVING*/ sum(a),b,c FROM t1 WHERE b > 0 GROUP BY b,c HAVING sum(a) > 100 AND c > 0

hints.description: 禁止下推HAVING表达式
hints.example: SELECT /*+NO_PUSHDOWN_HAVING*/ sum(a),b,c FROM t1 WHERE b > 0 GROUP BY b,c HAVING sum(a) > 100 AND c > 0

hints.description: 控制使用inlist-to-join对SQL进行改写

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: 可选参数，查询重写阈值，0表示cost_base，1表示rule_base，其他正整数表示查询重写阈值

hints.example: SELECT * FROM t5 WHERE slot = '5' AND (name) IN (SELECT /*+INLIST_TO_JOIN*/ name FROM t5 WHERE slot = '5' AND cid IN (5,1000,1001,1002,1003))

hints.description: 控制禁止使用inlist-to-join对SQL进行改写
hints.example: SELECT * FROM t5 WHERE slot = '5' AND (name) IN (SELECT /*+NO_INLIST_TO_JOIN*/ name FROM t5 WHERE slot = '5' AND cid IN (5,1000,1001,1002,1003))

hints.description: 允许行号下推
hints.example: SELECT * FROM (SELECT /*+ROWNUM_PUSHDOWN*/rownum rn, a FROM t1) WHERE rn BETWEEN 5 AND 10

hints.description: 禁止行号下推
hints.example: SELECT * FROM (SELECT /*+NO_ROWNUM_PUSHDOWN*/rownum rn, a FROM t1) WHERE rn BETWEEN 5 AND 10

hints.description: 设置本次查询执行内生效的查询优化相关GUC参数

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 可选参数，该hint只在指定为最外层的queryblock时才会生效

parameters.name: param
parameters.description: 参数名，支持布尔类、整型类、浮点类参数

hints.example: select /*+ set(enable_hashjoin off) */ * from t1 join t2 on t1.a = t2.a
hints.notes: GUC参数的hint只在最外层查询生效，子查询内的GUC参数hint不生效

hints.description: 指定使用Custom Plan执行，对于PBE方式执行的查询语句，强制使用定制计划
hints.example: prepare p as select /*+ use_cplan */ * from t where a = $1; execute p(1)
hints.notes: 仅对PBE方式执行的SQL语句生效，优先级高于基于代价的选择和plan_cache_mode参数

hints.description: 指定使用Generic Plan执行，对于PBE方式执行的查询语句，强制使用通用计划
hints.example: prepare p as select /*+ use_gplan */ * from t where a = $1; execute p(1)
hints.notes: 仅对PBE方式执行的SQL语句生效，优先级高于基于代价的选择和plan_cache_mode参数

hints.description: 对于以PBE方式执行的查询语句，触发自适应计划选择
hints.example: prepare k as select /*+ choose_adaptive_gplan */ * from t1 where c1=$1 and c2=$2 and c3=$3 and c4=$4
hints.notes: 仅对PBE方式执行的SQL语句生效，依赖GUC参数enable_cachedplan_mgr开启

hints.description: 指定不使用全局计划缓存，强制单个查询语句不在全局共享计划缓存，只保留会话生命周期的计划缓存
hints.example: prepare p1 as insert /*+ no_gpc*/ into t1 select c1,c2 from t2 where c1=$1
hints.notes: 仅在enable_global_plancache=on时对PBE执行的语句生效

hints.description: 指定内表物化
hints.example: INSERT /*+ material_subplan*/ INTO test_mt_sub SELECT * FROM test_src_mt_sub WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM test_mt_sub t1 WHERE t1.a = test_src_mt_sub.a)
hints.notes: 用于优化子查询的物化，减少重复计算

hints.description: Outline Hint的开始标记，用于完全复现某一计划而生成的一组hint信息
hints.example: SELECT /*+ BEGIN_OUTLINE_DATA HashJoin(@"sel$1" t1@"sel$1" t2@"sel$1") Leading(@"sel$1" (t1@"sel$1" t2@"sel$1")) TableScan(@"sel$1" t1@"sel$1") TableScan(@"sel$1" t2@"sel$1") VERSION("1.0.0") END_OUTLINE_DATA */ * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.a
hints.notes: 与END_OUTLINE_DATA必须成对使用，需要设置set explain_perf_mode = pretty

hints.description: Outline Hint的结束标记
hints.example: SELECT /*+ BEGIN_OUTLINE_DATA ... END_OUTLINE_DATA */ * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.a

hints.description: 指明子链接块的名称，用于指定子链接提升后的hint目标

parameters.name: @queryblock
parameters.description: 指定Hint所处于的查询块，可省略

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: 为该子链接块hint的别名的名称

hints.example: select /*+nestloop(store_sales tt) */ * from store_sales where ss_item_sk in ( select /*+blockname(tt)*/ i_item_sk from item group by 1 )
hints.notes: 仅在对应的子链接块没有提升时才会被上层查询使用

hints.description: 针对想要进行执行时间/资源管控的SQL语句，设置其被标记为慢SQL的执行时间，最大执行时间，最大IOPS上限

parameters.name: time_limit
parameters.description: SQL语句被标记为慢SQL的执行时长，取值为0-INT_MAX

parameters.name: max_execute_time
parameters.description: SQL语句的最大执行时间，执行时间超过该时长后被强制cancel退出，取值为0-INT_MAX

parameters.name: max_iops
parameters.description: SQL语句被标记为慢SQL后最大iops上限，取值范围为：Low，Medium，High，None，0-INT_MAX

hints.example: select /*+ wlmrule("100,500,1") */ * from t2 order by b limit 1
hints.notes: 仅在enable_thread_pool=on时对非sysadmin/monitoradmin用户执行的select类型的语句生效
